rationale: Severe mismatch on every axis: a high-energy Dragon Ball anime hook with saturated primaries clashes with Marble Sort's pastel lavender, soft 3D, character-free, calm/satisfying aesthetic. The Kamehameha visual communicates nothing about color sorting, physics drops, or conveyor management, and its core fanbase (young male anime/action players) is the opposite of the 25-55 female casual puzzle audience. Also IP-risky (Goku is Toei/Shueisha) — do not greenlight; if curiosity is the desired pitch, rebuild with ASMR satisfying-sort visuals instead.
